Whats with all the amber?
QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2007 at 12:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760118984
16 posts
Why does it drop off so many of the mobs in the serpent spine expansion does? Is it a story line thing or is there another reason?
Can someone shed some light on this phenomena?
▲ Page top
Amber
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2006 at 9:06 PM Rating: Decent
ymereJ
14 posts
This iten also drops in Crystal Caverns
